title: chrysopsis scabra
intro: Chrysopsis scabra, also known as golden aster or rough golden aster, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which provide its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Chrysopsis scabra has been linked to various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Chrysopsis scabra can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
